title: BPS Compliance Report
description: Data schema for the Building Performance Standard Compliance Analysis report template.

property.description: Identifying attributes of the subject building.

name.description: Building or property name, e.g. 'One Market Plaza'

address.description: Full street address including city, state, ZIP

gfa_sqft.description: Gross floor area in square feet

jurisdiction.description: City and state where the BPS applies.

regulation.description: The specific building performance standard governing this property.

name.description: Regulation name, e.g. 'Local Law 97', 'DC BEPS', 'Chicago Building Performance Standard'

authority.description: Enforcing agency, e.g. 'NYC Department of Buildings'

compliance_start_year.description: First compliance year for penalty exposure

penalty_rate_usd_per_tco2e.description: Fine per metric ton of CO2e over the threshold, where applicable (e.g. $268/tCO2e for LL97)

notes.description: Optional clarifying context about the regulation

current_performance.description: Measured or benchmarked performance for the current or most recent compliance year.

actual_carbon_kgco2_m2yr.description: Carbon intensity in kgCO2e/m2/yr (for carbon_intensity framework)

actual_eui_kbtu_sqft.description: Site EUI in kBtu/sqft/yr (for energy_intensity framework)

actual_emissions_tco2e.description: Absolute building emissions in metric tons CO2e

benchmark_threshold.description: The applicable threshold (tCO2e, kgCO2/m2, or EUI) for the current period

compliance_status.description: 'compliant' = below threshold; 'non-compliant' = above threshold with active penalty; 'at-risk' = within 10% of threshold

penalty_per_year_usd.description: Estimated annual fine if non-compliant. Omit or null if compliant.

performance_year.description: Calendar year of the measured data, e.g. 2024

data_source.description: Where the consumption data came from, e.g. 'ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager', 'utility bills', 'audit'

compliance_periods.description: Projected compliance status and penalty exposure for each regulatory period.

threshold_tco2e.description: Allowed emissions ceiling in tCO2e for this period

projected_penalty_usd.description: Estimated annual penalty if over threshold. Null if compliant.

pathway_to_compliance.description: Ordered list of measures that close the compliance gap, ranked by emissions reduction per dollar.

measure.description: Measure description, e.g. 'Heat pump retrofit — HVAC'

annual_savings_usd.description: Estimated annual operating cost savings from this measure

emissions_reduction_tco2e.description: Annual tCO2e reduction attributable to this measure

closes_gap_pct.description: Percentage of total compliance gap this measure closes (0-100)

running_gap_closed_pct.description: Cumulative % of gap closed including this and prior measures

penalty_projection.description: Year-by-year penalty table showing the cost of inaction.

certifications.description: Green certifications relevant to this property and jurisdiction.

penalty_offset_pct.description: If the regulation grants a penalty reduction for this cert, the % offset (e.g. 30)

description.description: Brief note on relevance or action required

prepared_by.description: Author or firm that prepared the report

report_date.description: ISO 8601 date the report was issued, e.g. '2026-06-16'
